description: Accepted N+1 scanner residuals after IFC-314 remediation (ADR-053). Owner: Backend Dev (STOA-Domain). CI fails on any NEW signature (pnpm nplus1:scan). Every read-amplification N+1 (per-id findById, per-tenant findUnique/findMany fan-out — incl. the account-scoring/entity-insight scheduled jobs, now batched with tenantId IN + in-memory grouping) was ELIMINATED. These residuals are justified per the brief's 'fixed OR documented' criterion and fall into three categories: (1) bounded-Low settings upserts over small fixed enums with soft-deactivate/update-by-id semantics where a safe single-query batch needs ON-CONFLICT raw SQL (lead/account/deal/ticket/pipeline/document settings, tenant-module); (2) intentional per-item DOMAIN WRITES where the READ is now batched but the save/create stays per-aggregate to preserve domain events (documents.router, TaskService, AutoResponseService, NotificationService state-resets, OutboxEventBusAdapter, DurableAuditLogAdapter); (3) intentional pagination / domain-depth-capped recursion / early-exit lookups (document-indexer, PrismaAccountRepository ancestors depth<=5, email resolveTenant + folder counts). See docs/operations/nplus1-audit/NPLUS1_REMEDIATION_REPORT.md.
